name: quantum-file-browser
description: Modern web-based file browser with persistent config and optional custom network selection

fields.name: QUANTUM_PORT
fields.label: App Port
fields.help: Port used to open Quantum File Browser in your browser.

fields.name: QUANTUM_BROWSE_LOCATION
fields.label: Files Folder
fields.help: Host path that Quantum File Browser will expose and let you browse.

fields.name: QUANTUM_DATA_LOCATION
fields.label: Config and Database Folder
fields.help: Stores Quantum config, database, cache, and other persistent internal data.

fields.name: RESTART_POLICY
fields.label: Restart Policy
fields.help: Controls whether the container restarts automatically.

fields.name: QUANTUM_NETWORK_MODE
fields.label: Network
fields.help: Choose Create New Bridge for the default Compose network, Host Mode for host networking, or an existing named Docker network.

fields.name: QUANTUM_INTERNAL_PORT
fields.label: Internal App Port
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal port used by Quantum File Browser.

fields.name: QUANTUM_BROWSE_TARGET
fields.label: Files Path Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal path for the files you want to browse.

fields.name: QUANTUM_DATA_TARGET
fields.label: Data Path Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal path for Quantum config, database, and cache data.

ui.overview: Quantum File Browser gives you a clean web UI for browsing and managing files from a selected folder.
what_happens: One Quantum File Browser container will be created
The folder you choose will be mounted into the app as the main file source
Config and database files will be stored in a separate persistent data folder
You can leave networking on Create New Bridge or attach to an existing network
ui.data_location: Relative paths are stored inside this app's project folder under the mounted EasyDocker base config path.
